question: Bagaimana cara mount ConfigMap sebagai file dalam volume di dalam Pod?
selection_rationale: SO answer score 47. Fully answerable from graph via 2-hop path (ConfigMap→PodSpec→Volume). Covers volumeMount pattern not present in any synthesized fixture (existing ConfigMap fixtures only cover env var, not volume mount). Classic K8s question with high SO score. Clean yaml_gen fit.

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: config-pod
spec:
  volumes:
    - name: config-vol
      configMap:
        name: my-config
  containers:
    - name: app
      image: nginx
      volumeMounts:
        - name: config-vol
          mountPath: /etc/config
context: io.k8s.api.core.v1.ConfigMap: holds configuration data as key-value pairs that can be consumed as volumes or environment variables
io.k8s.api.core.v1.Volume: represents a named volume in a Pod that may be accessed by any container in the pod
io.k8s.api.core.v1.VolumeMount: describes a mounting of a Volume within a container
